title: How major US stock indexes fared Tuesday 5/26/2026
memo: The U.S. stock market rose to more all-time highs on Tuesday after trading resumed following Monday's holiday. The S&P 500 rose 45.65 points, or 0.6%, to 7,519.12. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 118.02 points, or 0.2%, to 50,461.68. The Nasdaq Composite rose 312.21 points, or 1.2%, to 26,656.18. The Russell 2000 rose 51.31 points, or 1.8%, to 2,920.54. For the year, the S&P 500 is up 673.62 points, or 9.8%, the Dow is up 2,398.39 points, or 5%, the Nasdaq is up 3,414.19 points, or 14.7%, and the Russell 2000 is up 438.63 points, or 17.7%.

title: How major US stock indexes fared Wednesday 5/27/2026
memo: U.S. stocks inched to more records Wednesday. The S&P 500 rose 1.24 points, or less than 0.1%, to 7,520.36. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 182.60 points, or 0.4%, to 50,644.28. The Nasdaq Composite rose 18.55 points, or 0.1%, to 26,674.73. The Russell 2000 fell 0.60 points, or less than 0.1%, to 2,919.94. For the week, the S&P 500 is up 46.89 points, or 0.6%, while the Nasdaq is up 330.76 points, or 1.3%.

title: Wall Street pushes to more records as profits keep piling up for US companies
memo: Wall Street pushed toward more records Thursday as corporate profits stayed strong. The S&P 500 added 0.4% in late morning trading. Snowflake rose 34.1% after profit and revenue exceeded expectations. Dollar Tree rose 18.1%, Kohl's rallied 16.3%, Best Buy climbed 15.9%, and Hormel Foods climbed 9.8% after stronger-than-expected profit reports. Marvell Technology fell 1.3% after its profit matched expectations.

title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for First Quarter Fiscal 2027
memo: Nvidia reported record revenue of $81.6 billion for the first quarter ended April 26, 2026, up 20% from the previous quarter and up 85% from a year earlier. GAAP diluted EPS was $2.39, while non-GAAP diluted EPS was $1.87. The company also said AI infrastructure demand remained strong.

title: Apple Reports Record-Breaking 2Q 2026 Results
memo: Apple reported fiscal second-quarter revenue of $111.2 billion and earnings per share of $2.01. iPhone revenue grew 21.7% year over year, Services revenue grew 16.3%, and Greater China revenue grew 28.1%. The article said Apple's share price was down about 0.5% in after-hours trading after the earnings release.

title: Microsoft Cloud and AI Strength Fuels Third Quarter Results
memo: Microsoft reported revenue of $82.9 billion for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, up 18% year over year. Operating income was $38.4 billion, up 20%. Microsoft said its AI business surpassed a $37 billion annual revenue run rate, up 123% year over year.

title: Amazon.com Announces First Quarter Results
memo: Amazon reported first-quarter net sales of $181.5 billion, up 17% from a year earlier. AWS segment sales increased 28% year over year to $37.6 billion. Operating income increased to $23.9 billion from $18.4 billion in the prior-year quarter. Management said AWS had its fastest growth in 15 quarters.

title: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings release
memo: Alphabet reported first-quarter total revenues of $109.896 billion, up from $90.234 billion a year earlier. Google Cloud revenue was $20.028 billion, compared with $12.260 billion in the prior-year quarter. Total income from operations was $39.696 billion.

title: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings coverage
memo: Tesla delivered about $22.4 billion in first-quarter 2026 revenue, roughly 16% above the prior year. Adjusted EPS was reported at $0.41. The article said free cash flow turned negative, while Tesla stock initially moved higher after the results.

title: JPMorgan Chase 1Q26 earnings press release
memo: JPMorgan Chase reported first-quarter net income of $16.5 billion, up 13% from the prior year. Managed net revenue was $50.5 billion, up 10%. Net interest income was $25.5 billion, up 9%, and Markets revenue was $11.6 billion, up 20%.
